# Spec2Flow

Spec2Flow is a workflow orchestration framework for agent-friendly software delivery.

It is the control plane for a six-stage engineering loop:
- requirements analysis
- code implementation
- test design
- automated execution
- defect feedback
- collaboration workflow

Spec2Flow is the orchestrator, not the coding agent itself.

## Start Here

- [README.md](README.md): Product overview, goals, commands, and primary docs.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Repository architecture map, navigation, and core boundaries.
- [docs/index.md](docs/index.md): AI-facing reading order and source-of-truth map.

## Architecture And Boundaries

- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): Runtime model, orchestration boundaries, and specialist-agent overlay.
- [docs/structure.md](docs/structure.md): Current repository map and reading order.
- [docs/Harness_engineering.md](docs/Harness_engineering.md): How this repository should evolve to be easier for AI agents to navigate and verify.
- [docs/playbooks/index.md](docs/playbooks/index.md): Stage-scoped execution guidance for claimed route tasks.

## Copilot And Customization

- [docs/copilot.md](docs/copilot.md): Copilot customization and maintenance strategy.
- [.github/copilot-instructions.md](.github/copilot-instructions.md): Repository-wide execution policy for Copilot.
- [.github/instructions/docs.instructions.md](.github/instructions/docs.instructions.md): Rules for editing docs.
- [.github/instructions/typescript-cli.instructions.md](.github/instructions/typescript-cli.instructions.md): Rules for editing TypeScript CLI source.
- [.github/instructions/schemas.instructions.md](.github/instructions/schemas.instructions.md): Rules for editing schemas.

## Usage

- [docs/usage-guide.md](docs/usage-guide.md): Adoption flow, example commands, and adapter-backed execution.
- [docs/playbooks/requirements-analysis.md](docs/playbooks/requirements-analysis.md): Stage contract for route analysis.
- [docs/playbooks/code-implementation.md](docs/playbooks/code-implementation.md): Stage contract for code changes.
- [docs/playbooks/test-design.md](docs/playbooks/test-design.md): Stage contract for route-specific validation design.
- [docs/playbooks/automated-execution.md](docs/playbooks/automated-execution.md): Stage contract for command execution and execution evidence.
- [docs/playbooks/defect-feedback.md](docs/playbooks/defect-feedback.md): Stage contract for structured defect handoff.
- [docs/playbooks/collaboration.md](docs/playbooks/collaboration.md): Stage contract for PR or issue-ready collaboration output.
- [docs/collaboration.md](docs/collaboration.md): Collaboration workflow using GitHub and execution evidence.
- [docs/examples/synapse-network/README.md](docs/examples/synapse-network/README.md): Example target-system onboarding and workflow artifacts.

## Contracts

- [schemas/task-graph.schema.json](schemas/task-graph.schema.json): Workflow task graph contract.
- [schemas/execution-state.schema.json](schemas/execution-state.schema.json): Persisted execution-state contract.
- [schemas/model-adapter-capability.schema.json](schemas/model-adapter-capability.schema.json): Adapter capability contract.
- [schemas/model-adapter-runtime.schema.json](schemas/model-adapter-runtime.schema.json): Adapter runtime configuration contract.
- [schemas/onboarding-validator-result.schema.json](schemas/onboarding-validator-result.schema.json): Onboarding validation result contract.

## Runtime Source

- [packages/cli/src/cli/spec2flow-dist-entrypoint.ts](packages/cli/src/cli/spec2flow-dist-entrypoint.ts): TypeScript CLI source entrypoint.
- [packages/cli/dist/cli/spec2flow-dist-entrypoint.js](packages/cli/dist/cli/spec2flow-dist-entrypoint.js): Default compiled CLI runtime entrypoint.
- [packages/cli/src/runtime/](packages/cli/src/runtime/): Execution-state, routing, task-claim, task-result, and workflow-loop services.
- [packages/cli/src/planning/](packages/cli/src/planning/): Task-graph construction and planning logic.
- [packages/cli/src/adapters/](packages/cli/src/adapters/): Adapter execution, normalization, and Copilot CLI preflight.

## Verification Commands

- `npm run build`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run validate:synapse-example`
- `npm run generate:synapse-task-graph`
- `npm run generate:synapse-execution-state`
- `npm run preflight:copilot-cli`

## Source Of Truth Rules

- Repository files are the source of truth for architecture, contracts, and operating guidance.
- Schemas and TypeScript types define enforceable runtime contracts.
- Checked-in example files under `docs/examples/` are reference artifacts.
- Runtime files under `.spec2flow/` and `spec2flow/outputs/` are execution evidence, not durable documentation.

## Reading Strategy For AI Agents

1. Read [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) for the architecture boundary and navigation map.
2. Read [docs/index.md](docs/index.md) to choose the minimal relevant context.
3. Read the specific source-of-truth doc for the task domain.
4. Validate behavior against schemas, runtime code, and stable commands.
